payload.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "git apply <<'PATCH'
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: ../frontend/src/constants/agent.ts
@@
 export const agentRoleLabels = {
   planner: 'Planning and task breakdown',
   executor: 'Execution and delivery',
+  subagent: 'Focused support and task completion',
   reviewer: 'Review and validation',
 } as const
*** Update File: ../frontend/components/AgentTeamWorkspace.tsx
@@
 function pickPreferredCodexAgentId(agents: WorkspaceAgent[]) {
-  const runtimeAgent = agents.find((agent) => "'!['"'planner', 'executor', 'reviewer'].includes(agent.id))
+  const runtimeAgent = agents.find((agent) => "'!['"'planner', 'executor', 'subagent', 'reviewer'].includes(agent.id))
   return runtimeAgent?.id || null
 }
*** Update File: ../frontend/components/AgentDetailPanel.tsx
@@
-  const roleMap: Record<string, string> = { planner: '任务规划分解', executor: '任务执行', reviewer: '结果审查' }
+  const roleMap: Record<string, string> = {
+    planner: '任务规划分解',
+    executor: '任务执行',
+    subagent: '子任务支援',
+    reviewer: '结果审查',
+  }
*** Update File: ../frontend/components/FlowChart.tsx
@@
-const primaryFlowIds = ['planner', 'executor', 'reviewer']
+const primaryFlowIds = ['planner', 'executor', 'subagent', 'reviewer']
@@
       {
-        id: 'executor->reviewer',
+        id: 'executor->subagent',
         source: 'executor',
-        target: 'reviewer',
+        target: 'subagent',
+        type: 'default',
+        animated: active,
+        style: {
+          stroke: active ? 'rgba(45,212,191,0.82)' : 'rgba(148,163,184,0.3)',
+          strokeWidth: 1.9,
+        },
+      },
+      {
+        id: 'subagent->reviewer',
+        source: 'subagent',
+        target: 'reviewer',
         type: 'default',
         animated: active,
         style: {
-          stroke: active ? 'rgba(45,212,191,0.82)' : 'rgba(148,163,184,0.3)',
+          stroke: active ? 'rgba(34,197,94,0.82)' : 'rgba(148,163,184,0.3)',
           strokeWidth: 1.9,
         },
       },
@@
     if (agent.id === 'reviewer') {
-      layout[agent.id] = { x: 332, y: 644 }
+      layout[agent.id] = { x: 332, y: 850 }
+      return
+    }
+
+    if (agent.id === 'subagent') {
+      layout[agent.id] = { x: 332, y: 644 }
       return
     }
*** End Patch
PATCH"
